topics.title: Database Choice
topics.summary: Discuss which data store best fits a railway planning solution, including tradeoffs around structured schedules, search, analytics, and operational simplicity.

topics.title: API Design
topics.summary: Discuss how to design APIs for timetable, capacity, and simulation workflows so client apps and services can collaborate cleanly.

topics.title: Caching Strategy
topics.summary: Discuss what should be cached in a railway analysis solution, how freshness should be managed, and where caching could reduce latency without hiding important changes.

topics.title: Deployment Strategy
topics.summary: Discuss how to deploy a railway planning application reliably, including environment separation, rollout safety, observability, and operational ownership.

topics.title: Event-Driven Architecture
topics.summary: Discuss whether event-driven patterns would help coordinate timetable updates, analysis jobs, and downstream consumers in a railway solution.
